title: IIT Ropar Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Ropar (IIT Ropar) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 Project Associate-I Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the IIT Ropar office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./M.S. in Electrical Engineering or Electronics or similar field or equivalent qualification with 60% marks (or 6 grade points out of 10)
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E. or M.Tech./M.E./M.S. in Electrical Engineering or Electronics or similar field or equivalent qualification with 60% marks (or 6 grade points out of 10).
